title: The Rename Compat Project
description: Renaming everything in Modded MC to get rid of duplicates forever (Maple, Cattails, Silver, Limestone, Chalk, etc)
body:
# Preamble

Spiritual compatibility has always been something that irked me in Minecraft modding; not when two things don't work together at all but specifically when two things have entirely identical names.

Further complications are created when the two items have differing uses or rarities as simply replacing one thing with another (BlockSwap, Biome Swapper Etc.) won't always preserve balance. Not to mention someone probably worked hard on the assets you're now stripping from the mod! So here's my solution;

This resource pack aims to eventually rename every common item/mob/block/biome found in modern modded Minecraft to something else or, usually, something with more specificity. Limestone from Alex's Caves becomes Primordial Limestone to preserve spiritual compatibility with Quark's Limestone, for example. I tried to ensure each name choice matched whatever the mod author was likely going for but if I made any missteps, please let me know! These new names will appear everywhere you can think of (except special debug menus) including Advancements and Subtitles!

The RCP fully supports all ModLoaders and Minecraft Versions as old as 1.12.2! Additionally, special adjustments have been made to ensure cross-compatibility across all modern versions, including 1.16 (Not just for 1.20 anymore!)

## Priorities

The Rename Compat Project aims to solve many problems within modded Minecraft, not just compatibility. The 3 Pillars of Priority for The RCP are as follows

Compatibility; The original mission statement of the project and overall primary priority. The Rename Compat Project seeks to use renames to eventually make every single mod in Minecraft 'spiritually compatible' with one another by renaming away duplicates, eliminating redudancy and turning incompatibility into variety.
Polish; While the contents of The RCP itself have always been held to the highest standards of polish, as development has progressed, the polish of every other mod has become a huge priority as well. There are great mods with iffy polish on the spelling, and capitalization side of things; The RCP is attempting to resolve those issues with all mods singlehandedly.
Consistency; Similarly to polish, many mods do not name things in a manner consistent to their parent mods' or sometimes even vanilla Minecraft naming conventions. 'Bucket of Entity', rather than 'Entity Bucket', for example. The RCP seeks to unify the naming conventions within all mods to provide a clean and infinitely more searchable registry of blocks, items, mobs, etc.

## Support List (v1.5)

Biomes: 

Biomes O' Plenty, Terralith, Oh the Biomes We've Gone (+Oh The Biomes You'll Go), Traverse Reforged, Terrestria Reforged, Alex's Caves, YUNG's Cave Biomes, Autumnity, Atmospheric, Sapwood, Regions Unexplored, Nature's Spirit, [Let's Do] Blooming Nature, Promenade (Fabric), Bayou Blues, Abundance, Nature Arise, Mystic's Biomes, Wetland Whimsy, Sleepy Hollows, Beneath the Wetlands (Fabric)

Worldgen: 

Ecologics, Environmental, Windswept, Twigs, Spelunkery, Galosphere, Darker Depths, Better Default Biomes, Caverns & Chasms, Biome Makeover (+Compat Makeover), Immersive Weathering, Terraqueous, Project: Vibrant Journeys, Good Ending, Swampier Swamps, Unearthed, Seafarer, Sakura, Haunted Harvest, [Let's Do] Meadow, [Let's Do] Beach Party, Wilder Wild (Fabric), Mystical World, Wilds, Aquatic Frontiers, Wild Lands

Farmer's Delight:

Farmer's Delight, Farmer's Respite (+Respiteful), Brewin' And Chewin', (+Cocktails Delight) Delightful, Collector's Reap, Hearth and Harvest, Crabber's Delight, Cultural Delights, Vanilla Delight, Rustic Delight, Vintage Delight, Coffee Delight, Unusual Delight (Hostile Delight), Fruit's Delight, Veggies Delight, Large Meals, Dungeons Delight, Miner's Delight, Ube's Delight, Casualness Delight, Trails & Tales Delight, Sunflower Delight, Berries & Cherries, My Nether's Delight, Seed Delight, Gensokyo Delight ~ Youkai's Homecoming

Compat Addons: Abnormals Delight, Simple Delights, Aether Delight, Alex's Delight, Twilight Flavors & Delight, Windswept Delights, Galospheric Delight, Jellyfishing Delight, Yucutan Delight, Ice and Fire Delight, Crate Delight, Nature's Delight, Vampire's Delight, Enderite's Delight, Naturalist Delight

Farming/Food: 

Thermal Cultivation, Croptopia (+Croptopia Additions) Pam's Harvestcraft 2 (Crops, Trees, Core & Extended), Vanilla Cookbook, Crockpot, Aromatic, Caupona, Cosmopolitan, [Let's Do] Farm & Charm, Simple Farming, Enhanced Farming, Forestry, [Let's Do] Vinery, [Let's Do] Bakery, [Let's Do] Brewery, [Let's Do] Applewood, [Let's Do] Candlelight, [Let's Do] Herbal Brews, [Let's Do] Corn Expansion, Sprout, Butchery, Sushi Go Crafting, Neapolitan, Peculiars, Seasonals, Cookielicious, Wild Berries, Simply Tea, Just More Cakes!

Magic: 

Hexalia, Goety, Hexerei, Malum, Occultism, Arcanus (Fabric), Bewitchment (Fabric), Feywild, Vampirism

Mobs, Animals: 

Alex's Mobs, Naturalist, Aquaculture 2, [Let's Do] Wilder Nature, Unnamed Animal Mod, Living Things, Critters and Companions, Luminous: Overworld, Spawn, Buzzier Bees, Prehistoric Fauna, Unusual Prehistory, Upgrade Aquatic, Bountiful Critters, Fintastic, Fish of Thieves, Tameable Beasts, Glorious Creatures, Mo' Creatures: Nostalgia Edition, Better Animals Plus, Faunify, Hybrid Aquatic, Oceanic Realms, Ben's Sharks, Animalium, Jellyfishing, Silly Critters, Thalassophobia, Koopa's Critters, Zoological Mod: Decorations & Animal Collection, Aardvark's Weird Zoology

Mobs, Monsters:

Ice and Fire, Born in Chaos, Friends & Foes, Ender Zoology, More Critters, Plenty of Golems, Enderman Overhaul, Mobs of Mythology, Species, Orcz, Fish's Undead Rising, Creatures and Beasts (+Port), Tameable Beasts, Astemir's Forestcraft, Terramity, Iter RPG, The Graveyard, Danny's Expansion, Grimoire of Gaia, Zombie Variants, Zombies+, Luminous: Beasts, Luminous: Nether, Rotten Creatures, The Undead Revamped, Dungeons Mod, Wesley's Roguelike Dungeons, Legendary Creatures, MobZ, AdventureZ (Fabric), Enemy Expansion, Opposing Force, Mob Compack

Ore/Tech:

Mekanism, Applied Energistics 2, Refined Storage, EnderIO, Immersive Engineering, Industrial Foregoing, Ad Astra, Voltaic, Powah!, Electrodynamics, Railcraft Reborn, Cyclic, Fantasy Metals, Immersive Ores, Ancient Elements, Oreganized, Create, Create: Bells & Whistles, Create: The Factory Must Grow, Silent's Gems, Silent Gear, ExtraGems, Gobber 2, Ores Above Diamonds, The Gems Project, Gems & Crystals, Simple Ores, Gems & Jewels, Gem Infusions, Crystals Overhauled, Gemspark, More Gems (Fabric), Organics, Enderite CJ Edition, LieOnLion's Enderite, Aethersteel

Dimensions:

Deeper Darker, Rubinated Nether, BetterNether (Fabric), Nourished Nether, Jaden's Nether Expansion, Even Better Nether, Nether's Exoticism, BetterEnd (Fabric), Unusual End, Enlightened End, End's Phantasm, Endergetic Expansion, Twilight Forest, Rediscovered, The Aether, Aether Redux, Ancient Aether, Blue Skies, Lands of Icaria

Decor:

Stoneworks, Premium Wood, Mr. Crayfish's Furniture Mod: Refurbished, Dusty Decorations, Beautify, The New Shutters, Variant Crafting Tables (Both Versions), Variant Barrels, MrCrayfish's More Furniture Mod, Iron Age Furniture, Adorn, All Macaw's Series Compat Mods, Blocks+, Furnitures O' Plenty

Other Mods:

Minecolonies, Quark, Supplementaries, Call of Yucatán, Additional Additions, Sully's Mod, Arts & Crafts, Ravage & Cabbage, Special Drops, Better Archeology, Scorched Guns, Samurai Dynasty, Tool's Complement, Fuze's Relics, End Remastered

Extra Compatibility:

Every Compat: Wood Good, Stone Zone, Gems Realm

Dynamic Trees + All Addons

Other: Dramatic Doors, Compat O' Plenty, More Storage Drawers, Storage Drawers Extra, Functional Storage Extra, All  The Wood We've Got, Apple Crates (BOP/BYG), More Chest Variants (MCV) - BM/BOP, Bark O Plenty, Blue Skies Bark, Simply Tools, Vanilla AOITs, LieOnLion's Gilded Armor, More Horse Armor, Extra Golems, Decorative Blocks Modded Compat, Tool's Complement - Caverns and Chasms & Oreganized, Crate Delight: Croptopia

Retro Support (1.12):

Quark, Biomes O' Plenty, Oh The Biomes You'll Go, Mystical World, Traverse, Fish's Undead Rising, Natura, Mo' Creatures, Better Animals Plus, Twilight Forest, Bewitchment, Familiar Fauna, Traverse, Moar Signs

Supported but not Included:

Tide, Go Fish (Fabric), Thermal Foundation, L_Ender's Cataclysm, Special Mobs, Kobolds, Archeological, Unusual Prehistory 2, Xycraft: World, Enderite Mod

## Extra 
Terralith support incidentally means no more ugly "biome.terralith.gravel_beach" appearing under your Xaero's Minimap or on your Nature's Compass; Terralith biomes will now appear correctly (as "Gravel Beach" in this instance).
One element of 'polish' includes reverting British spellings back to American ones. I'm sorry if you have a preference for British spellings but as every included lang file is 'en_US', I felt it would be better to introduce consistency. I don't necessarily like 'Grey' items escaping the search query because I searched for 'Gray' and I don't think most people do either, whether they're American or English. 
Requests for additional mods to be supported are ALWAYS encouraged in the comments and will usually be included in the very next update!!
Please visit the FAQ for more information Here
The RCP uses MIT licenses meaning you are free to use this pack in any way you would like. Feel free to include in modpacks without permission, no need to even credit (but I sure would appreciate it)!

## Special Thanks
Starcage: Thank you to Starcage for developing Startools [https://github.com/Starcage1/StarTools-MMDC](https://github.com/Starcage1/StarTools-MMDC); an excellent utility for checking duplicates in Modpacks! It even includes special functionality for RCP detection! Use it while testing your modpack, even if you don't use the RCP, it's incredible. It was a great help to me personally to find those little niche duplicates I wouldn't necessarily think of.
